name: The First Frost
overview: Wen Yifan, by chance, ends up living with her high school classmate Sang Yan, whom she once rejected. They keep their distance until Wen Yifan learns from Sang Yan that she sleepwalks, intertwining their lives once more.

trailers.title: 【Official Trailer】The First Frost: Unspoken love, hidden in the rush of the world.✨ | YOUKU
